allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Compress-Archive -Path '*.html','*.jsx','*.css','netlify.toml','uploads' -DestinationPath 'ims-deploy.zip' -Force; if \(Test-Path 'ims-deploy.zip'\) { Write-Output \('Created ims-deploy.zip - ' + [math]::Round\(\(Get-Item ims-deploy.zip\).Length/1KB\) + ' KB'\) }")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\ims-deploy.zip"\) { $f = Get-Item "D:\\ims-deploy.zip"; Write-Output "EXISTS: $\($f.FullName\) | Size: $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1KB, 1\)\) KB | Modified: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { Write-Output "NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Inventory Management System" | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"D:\\Inventory Management System\\serve.ps1`"" -WindowStyle Normal)
